title: Don't Starve: Reborn
description: 1.12.2 unofficial remake version of No Starve To Death Mod and it aims to make it easier for players to get food at the beginning.
body:
Don't Starve: Reborn is a 1.12.2 unofficial remake version of No Starve To Death Mod which aims to make it easier for players to get food at the beginning.  

This mod adds several new food and blocks on the basis of the original mod.  

The edible value of the food in the original mod is adjusted slightly in this mod.  

It is conducive to reduce your probability of starvation.  

Attention: This mod has no relations with the computer game ＂Don't Starve＂.  

The mod is made by MCreator.
